archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy / Trust) combined with Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) via Glassmorphism

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-[#0D1B3E]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]

glassmorphism_recipe.surface_strategy: Crystal Glass for floating panels, Solid for heavy data to ensure legibility.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) to feel premium, accessible, and reduce cognitive load for non-technical users.
layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: The Control Room Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout_spacing.marketing_grid: The Tetris Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

button.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2563EB] to-[#1D4ED8] text-white font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(37,99,235,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200
button.secondary: bg-white text-[#1D4ED8] border border-[#DBEAFE] font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#EFF6FF] transition-colors duration-200
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:text-[#2563EB] hover:bg-[#EFF6FF] px-4 py-2 rounded-xl transition-colors duration-200

components.input: w-full bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#0F172A] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3B82F6] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all placeholder-slate-400

charts.style: Clean Line/Bar charts. No 3D. Glass axes/gridlines (faint, blurred lines) while keeping data bars solid and high-contrast (#2563EB). Tooltips should be glassmorphic.

components.empty_states: Abstract geometric shapes with subtle AI glowing orbs in #EFF6FF and #DBEAFE. Very clean, minimal illustrative style. Never use generic 'people' illustrations for empty states. Always include a primary CTA.

marketing_site_guidelines.hero_visual_direction: Floating 'Frosted AI' glassmorphism dashboard cards overlapping diagonally over a very subtle ambient mesh background (#EFF6FF to #DBEAFE). Cards should show 'AI Script Generator' and a 'Call Analytics' pulse chart. Subtle glowing orb in #3B82F6 behind the glass cards for depth.
marketing_site_guidelines.gradient_placements: Ambient mesh background behind Hero and CTA sections using Blue 50 and Blue 100. Text gradients strictly on the 'AI Voice Receptionist' highlights using the Primary Gradient.

images.description: Indian business professional using laptop in modern office. Trustworthy and premium, establishing context for Indian SMEs.
Indian female doctor in clinic, representing the clinic appointment reminder use case.

dashboard_guidelines.sidebar_style: Collapsible, solid #F8FAFC or very light glass, subtle right border (#E2E8F0). Icons use Lucide (thin stroke) with label. Active state gets a soft #EFF6FF background and #2563EB text.
dashboard_guidelines.kpi_cards: Use the Card-in-Card pattern. The outer container is glass/solid, the inner stat has a subtle high-contrast pulse if live. Top-left card is the 'North Star' (e.g., Active Campaigns).
dashboard_guidelines.call_history_table: Clean, generous row spacing (py-4), badge pills for status (Completed, Failed, Voicemail). Audio player should be inline and minimal.
dashboard_guidelines.ai_script_generator: Side-by-side layout. Left: Input form. Right: Generated output cards with variants in glass containers.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format. For example, data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='upload-csv-input', data-testid='generate-script-button'.
